_meta.description: Unified tool categorization for both tool-ready and compression strategies
_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for tool classification and compression thresholds across all adapters
_meta._aliases_note: The '_aliases' section below is a reference mapping only — not consumed by code. It documents canonical tool name normalization for human readers.

layer_1_skip._description: Layer 1: Skip all compression (preserve integrity for content retrieval)
layer_1_skip._rationale: These tools return file content or search results that should not be truncated

layer_2_shell._description: Layer 2: Moderate truncation for shell/exec tools
layer_2_shell._rationale: Shell commands produce text output that can be safely truncated if too long

layer_3_api._description: Layer 3: Zero-truncation for API/structured tools (default for tools not in layer_1 or layer_2)
layer_3_api._rationale: API responses and structured data should not be truncated; tools in this layer are implicit — any tool not in layer_1_skip or layer_2_shell falls here

_aliases._description: Canonical name mappings (reference only — not consumed by code)
